top_signals.title: EU agrees to accelerate defence industrial base ramp-up and simplify defence procurement
top_signals.summary: European Commission Press release Brussels, 10 Jun 2026 The European Commission welcomes the provisional political agreement reached today between the European Parliament and the Council of the EU to simplify security and defence procurement, facilitate defence investments and support the defence industry.
